title: 1987-1997: Ten Years Since the Intifada Began
variables_supported: Palestinians killed by Israeli security forces
Israeli security forces killed by Palestinians
strengths: Best reviewed source for the pre-Oslo aggregate phase because it explicitly separates locations and victim categories.
limitations: Does not provide the Palestinian civilian/combatant split needed for a full DR; denominator data not included.
notes: Core anchor for the main pre-Oslo episode.

title: 1990 Temple Mount killings
strengths: Very clearly bounded subepisode with a stable public death figure.
limitations: Not denominator-ready; some reporting elsewhere gives 17-21 deaths, so a strict low figure is preferable.
notes: Used conservatively for the single-day subepisode.

title: First Intifada
limitations: Not used for core death counting when stronger B'Tselem figures exist.
